title: Termination of Contracts: If an employment contract is for a fixed term and...
summary: Assess whether notice is required at the end of a fixed-term employment contract.
prompt: If an employment contract is for a fixed term and expires, must the employer provide notice?

options.text: For fixed-term employment contracts, the contract naturally terminates at the

solution: For fixed-term employment contracts, the contract naturally terminates at the end of the specified term without the need for notice. The employer is not required to provide notice of termination once the agreed-upon duration has been fulfilled.
